description_long: This street cabinet features a robust, industrial design with a rectangular main body and an attached cylindrical section, likely housing technical equipment. The exterior is predominantly white with black and gray accents, giving it a utilitarian and high-contrast appearance. Two tall, vertically striped exhaust stacks rise from the cylindrical section, suggesting ventilation or exhaust functions. The front face is detailed with a recessed panel and a ramp-like protrusion, possibly for access or maintenance. The sides and rear display ribbed and paneled surfaces, enhancing structural rigidity and visual complexity. The overall construction appears to be metallic, suitable for protecting sensitive equipment in urban environments.
description: A sturdy, white and black street cabinet with tall exhaust stacks, ribbed panels, and a ramped front access area.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main access panel with a ramp and the two tall exhaust stacks rising from the right side.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlights the cylindrical section and the base structure, with one stack visible and ribbed detailing.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the ribbed back panels and both exhaust stacks, emphasizing the cabinet's depth and structure.
description_view_3: Right-side view reveals a solid side panel with geometric detailing and the base of the exhaust stacks.
